amplify.app.customrule.Condition.Docs: The condition for a URL rewrite or redirect rule, such as a country code.

amplify.app.customrule.Source.Docs: The source pattern for a URL rewrite or redirect rule.

amplify.app.customrule.Status.Docs: The status code for a URL rewrite or redirect rule.     200  Represents a 200 rewrite rule.  301  Represents a 301 (moved pemanently) redirect rule. This and all future requests should be directed to the target URL.   302  Represents a 302 temporary redirect rule.  404  Represents a 404 redirect rule.  404-200  Represents a 404 rewrite rule.

amplify.app.customrule.Target.Docs: The target pattern for a URL rewrite or redirect rule.
